title: fapdos' Aquatic Additions
description: Adds many new fish creatures and underwater decorations to the game
body:
Have any suggestion? Want to report a bug? We have a Discord server! You can join and ask anything you want

 

Introduction

This mod aims to add many different kinds of fish and underwater decorations to the game. This mod is meant to be as simple as possible while still adding good quality things, new items, new fish, new blocks, new plants, and more. This mod does NOT add any new biomes, NO new dimensions, all this mod adds are additions to the already existing Minecraft oceanic biomes.

 

A lot of the mobs added by this mod can be caught in a water bucket.

 

This mod is for Forge and there will never be a Fabric port.

 

List of mobs & information about them


There are a lot of mobs in this mod, so if you want to know about them, you'll have to read this Google Doc. Click here to get to a guide of all the new mobs added by the mod.

 

Items added by the mod

 

Blue Glowing Dust

Dropped by Anglerfish. Can be used for crafting Blue Glowstone Block and Blue Redstone Lamp.

 

Crustacean Meat & Fish Meat

Generic meat items dropped by the mobs added by the mod. They work just like any other food item in the game, you can eat them and cook them in a furnace, smoker or campfire. They both can also be used for crafting Strange Salad, which is a new food item that recovers the entirety of your hunger bar.

 

Jelly Slime

Dropped by jellyfish and similars. This item is used for brewing potions of Glowing, and it can also be used for crafting a Jelly Slime Block, which gives a slight glow, and it can also be used for crafting Caramel Candy, which is a food item that can be eaten quickly. It can also be used for crafting Strange Salad, which is a new food item that recovers the entirety of your hunger bar.

 

Clam

Decorative underwater block found in Warm Ocean. They come in three colors (White, Blue & Orange). They drop Pearls when broken.

 

Pearl

Obtained from breaking Clams. This item is used for crafting a Pearl Block and Spiky Traps.

 

Spiky Trap

Spiky Traps hurt entities that walk on it. They also work underwater. They do not need redstone to work, they are always working without the need of redstone.

 

Harp Sponge

They are underwater decorative blocks found in any oceanic biome.

 

Shingle Urchin

They are underwater decorative blocks found in any oceanic biome.

 

Tube Worms

They are underwater decorative plants found in any oceanic biome. They come in different sizes: Big, Medium, Small & Grouped

 

Sea Pens

They are underwater decorative plants found in any oceanic biome. They come in two colors: Pink & Orange

 

Water Machines

These machines are crafted with prismarine crystals, nautilus shell and either gold or netherite scrap. These machines give players around a 36 blocks diameter either Haste or Mining Fatigue depending on the one you craft. They only work when they are underwater.

 

Ectoplasm

Ectoplasm is obtained from killing Ship Ghosts. This is an item that can be used for crafting a scepter that deals extra damage to Undead creatures. It can also be used for crafting Strange Salad, which is a new food item that recovers the entirety of your hunger bar.

 

Strange Salad

This is a new food item crafted with a Bowl, Ectoplasm, Jelly Slime, Cooked Fish Meat & Cooked Crustacean Meat. This food item recovers the entirety of your hunger bar.

 

Narwhal Horn

This item is obtained from killing Narwhals. When right-clicked while underwater, it will give you Water Breathing for 4 seconds.
